args.sql:
SELECT objid, kommunenummer, kommunenavn, omrade,
       ST_XMin(ST_Envelope(omrade)) AS minx,
       ST_YMin(ST_Envelope(omrade)) AS miny,
       ST_XMax(ST_Envelope(omrade)) AS maxx,
       ST_YMax(ST_Envelope(omrade)) AS maxy
FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune
WHERE LOWER(kommunenavn) ILIKE '%kristiansand%';

args.sql:
SELECT id, ssbid1000m, shape_area
FROM statistiskrutenett1km.statistiskrutenett1km
WHERE geom && ST_MakeEnvelope(62543.56990607368, 6428946.019998128, 107683.72996255726, 6493405.01999838, 25833)
AND ST_Intersects(geom, ST_Transform(ST_SetSRID(ST_GeomFromEWKT('SRID=25833;GEOMETRYCOLLECTION EMPTY'),25833),25833)) = FALSE
LIMIT 0;

final_sql:
-- STEP 1: query [kommuner]
SELECT objid, kommunenummer, kommunenavn, omrade,
       ST_XMin(ST_Envelope(omrade)) AS minx,
       ST_YMin(ST_Envelope(omrade)) AS miny,
       ST_XMax(ST_Envelope(omrade)) AS maxx,
       ST_YMax(ST_Envelope(omrade)) AS maxy
FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune
WHERE LOWER(kommunenavn) ILIKE '%kristiansand%';

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 2: query [statistiskrutenett1km]
SELECT id, ssbid1000m, geom
FROM public.statistiskrutenett1km
WHERE geom && ST_MakeEnvelope(62543.56990607368, 6428946.019998128, 107683.72996255726, 6493405.01999838, 25833);

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 3: query [stormflohavniva]
SELECT objid, omrade
FROM stormflohavniva_bd7c84ed67254396b81e18b48ee0f525.stormflo200ar_klimaarna
WHERE omrade && ST_MakeEnvelope(62543.56990607368, 6428946.019998128, 107683.72996255726, 6493405.01999838, 25833);

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 4: spatial_join
-- left_source: 2
-- right_source: 3
-- join_type: "intersects"
-- left_geom: "geom"
-- right_geom: "omrade"

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 5: aggregate
-- source_step: 4
-- aggregation_type: "count"
-- metric_as: "count"

1.sql:
SELECT objid, kommunenummer, kommunenavn, omrade,
       ST_XMin(ST_Envelope(omrade)) AS minx,
       ST_YMin(ST_Envelope(omrade)) AS miny,
       ST_XMax(ST_Envelope(omrade)) AS maxx,
       ST_YMax(ST_Envelope(omrade)) AS maxy
FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune
WHERE LOWER(kommunenavn) ILIKE '%kristiansand%';

1.description: get Kristiansand municipality geometry and bounding box

2.description: get 1km grid cells that intersect the municipality bounding box (prefilter) for spatial join

3.description: get 200-year storm-surge polygons (stormflo200ar_klimaarna) intersecting the municipality bounding box (prefilter)

4.description: find grid cells (from step 2) that intersect storm-surge polygons (from step 3)

5.description: collapse to one row per grid cell (deduplicate) by counting per grid id

6.description: count the number of unique grid cells intersecting storm surge areas

7.description: sort final count (deterministic step) - not strictly required but included as requested

8.description: limit final result to one row

args.sql:
WITH k AS (SELECT ST_GeomFromEWKT(omrade_ewkt) AS geom FROM (SELECT ST_AsEWKT(omrade) AS omrade_ewkt FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune WHERE LOWER(kommunenavn) ILIKE '%kristiansand%') t)
SELECT s.omrade AS storm_geom, s.*
FROM stormflohavniva_bd7c84ed67254396b81e18b48ee0f525.stormflo200ar_klimaarna s, k
WHERE ST_Intersects(s.omrade, (SELECT geom FROM k));

args.sql:
SELECT objid, kommunenummer, kommunenavn, ST_AsEWKT(omrade) AS omrade_ewkt,
  ST_XMin(ST_Envelope(omrade)) AS minx,
  ST_YMin(ST_Envelope(omrade)) AS miny,

FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune
WHERE LOWER(kommunenavn) ILIKE '%kristiansand%';

args.sql:
WITH k AS (SELECT ST_GeomFromEWKT(omrade_ewkt) AS geom FROM (SELECT ST_AsEWKT(omrade) AS omrade_ewkt FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune WHERE LOWER(kommunenavn) ILIKE '%kristiansand%') t)
SELECT s.*
FROM stormflohavniva_bd7c84ed67254396b81e18b48ee0f525.stormflo200ar_klimaarna s, k
WHERE ST_Intersects(s.omrade, (SELECT geom FROM k));
